Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class IndustriesLoyaltySettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.IndustriesLoyaltySettings2
public class IndustriesLoyaltySettings2 extends SObject

Java class for IndustriesLoyaltySettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IndustriesLoyaltySettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAutomaticMemberTierAssessmentSelectionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAutomaticVoucherCodeGenerationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsFixedTypeNqpAggregationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLoyaltyApiAccessForExternalSiteUsersEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLoyaltyRedeemedPointsExpirationInfoPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLoyaltyRulesVerifyCdpMemberSegmentEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLoyaltyServiceExcellenceEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsNonQualifyingPointsConsolidationEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsNqpRealTimePointBalanceEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsQpRealTimePointBalanceEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}IndustriesLoyaltySettings" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
